class Adapter(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(d_model, 128)
        self.act0 = nn.SiLU()
        self.drop0 = nn.Dropout(0.1)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(128, 128)
        self.act1 = nn.SiLU()
        self.drop1 = nn.Dropout(0.1)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(128, output_dim)

    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        x = hidden_states.max(dim=1)[0]
        x = self.fc0(x)
        x = self.act0(x)
        x = self.drop0(x)
        x = self.fc1(x)
        x = self.act1(x)
        x = self.drop1(x)
        x = self.fc2(x)
        return x

class Adapter(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.proj_conv = nn.Linear(d_model, 256)
        self.conv = nn.Conv1d(256, 256, kernel_size=3, stride=2)
        self.act_conv = nn.SiLU()
        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(256, output_dim)

    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        x = self.proj_conv(hidden_states)
        x = x.transpose(1, 2)
        x = self.act_conv(self.conv(x))
        x = x.mean(dim=2)
        x = self.fc0(x)
        return x

class Adapter(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.pre_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(d_model, 256)
        self.act0 = nn.ReLU()
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(256, 128)
        self.act1 = nn.ReLU()
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(128, output_dim)

    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        hidden_states = self.pre_norm(hidden_states)
        x = hidden_states.mean(dim=1)
        x = self.fc0(x)
        x = self.act0(x)
        x = self.fc1(x)
        x = self.act1(x)
        x = self.fc2(x)
        return x

    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):

        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(d_model, 256)
        self.act0 = nn.SiLU()
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(256, 256)
        self.act1 = nn.SiLU()
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, output_dim)

        hidden_states = self.pre_norm(hidden_states)

        x = self.fc0(x)
        x = self.act0(x)
